title: geranium krylovii
intro: Geranium krylovii, also known as the Chinese geranium or Krylov's geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Geranium krylovii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. Herbal preparations of Geranium krylovii include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
